error_paths.condition: missing required fields or invalid enum
roomId missing or join operation failed
error_paths.next_step: surface error and retry if transient

error_paths.condition: auth/roomId missing or leave operation failed
invalid params, duplicate request, blocked relation, rate limit
invalid params or invalid request state
invalid params or invalid request state
query length <3 or >50 or search error
invalid params or duplicate active invitation
stale stateVersion or action processing failure
challenge does not exist for user/day

error_paths.next_step: keep playing and retry claim when completed

error_paths.condition: all daily challenges are not completed
complete-all bonus already claimed for the day

AUTH_EXPIRED.meaning: Session/token expired or session version mismatch
AUTH_EXPIRED.mandatory_client_behavior: clear auth state, disconnect, force login

TOKEN_REVOKED.mandatory_client_behavior: clear auth state, disconnect, force login

INVALID_TOKEN.mandatory_client_behavior: clear auth state and login again

ACTION_REJECTED.mandatory_client_behavior: surface error, drop pending action if correlated

STATE_RESYNC_REQUIRED.meaning: Client state stale or processing conflict/failure
STATE_RESYNC_REQUIRED.mandatory_client_behavior: send GET_GAME_STATE_BY_ROOM and replace local state

APP_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED.meaning: Client app version below minimum gate
APP_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED.mandatory_client_behavior: stop realtime and force update UX

CHALLENGE_NOT_FOUND.meaning: Challenge was not found for the current user/day

CHALLENGE_NOT_COMPLETED.meaning: Challenge reward claim attempted while challenge is still in progress
CHALLENGE_NOT_COMPLETED.mandatory_client_behavior: keep challenge in progress and continue gameplay

CHALLENGE_ALREADY_CLAIMED.meaning: Challenge reward has already been claimed
CHALLENGE_ALREADY_CLAIMED.mandatory_client_behavior: refresh rewards state and disable claim action

CHALLENGE_EXPIRED.meaning: Challenge expired at daily reset time
CHALLENGE_EXPIRED.mandatory_client_behavior: refresh daily challenges and show expired state

COMPLETE_ALL_NOT_UNLOCKED.meaning: Complete-all bonus cannot be claimed before all daily challenges are completed

COMPLETE_ALL_ALREADY_CLAIMED.meaning: Complete-all bonus has already been claimed for this day
COMPLETE_ALL_ALREADY_CLAIMED.mandatory_client_behavior: refresh complete-all state and disable claim action

steps: receive GAME_ACTION stream updates with new stateVersion
clear pending action when correlated ACK/ERROR arrives
notes: ACTION_ACK does not guarantee final successful game application
business outcome is in subsequent GAME_ACTION stream

steps: resume GAME_ACTION sends with latest stateVersion

compatibility_notes: ACTION_ACK is acceptance/duplicate handling and not guaranteed final apply success.
ERROR with STATE_RESYNC_REQUIRED requires immediate GET_GAME_STATE_BY_ROOM snapshot pull.
Runtime auth/session/token gates can terminate socket after initial auth.
Signal casing is mixed (room_list and room_update are lowercase, many direct responses are uppercase).
Debug/test-controller-only websocket surfaces are excluded from this v3 contract.
docs/README_WEBSOCKET_V2.md is legacy and non-authoritative for v3 integration.
GAME_INVITATION_SENT may arrive as direct success response or async push; parse by type and payload keys, not only success flag.

ws_error_policy.AUTH_EXPIRED: clear auth state, disconnect, force login
ws_error_policy.TOKEN_REVOKED: clear auth state, disconnect, force login
ws_error_policy.INVALID_TOKEN: clear auth state and login again
ws_error_policy.ACTION_REJECTED: surface error, drop pending action if correlated
ws_error_policy.STATE_RESYNC_REQUIRED: send GET_GAME_STATE_BY_ROOM and replace local state

ws_error_policy.CHALLENGE_EXPIRED: refresh daily challenges and show expired state
